description: bl-8a9a's in-place migration (state_repo::ensure) absorbs a legacy real .balls/plugins/ into .balls/state-repo via absorb_plugins_dir, but the files land UNCOMMITTED. ensure() runs seed() — which commits .gitattributes/.gitkeep — BEFORE ensure_plugins_symlink -> absorb_plugins_dir moves the *.json files in; nothing commits them afterward, and bl sync/bl prime do not. The absorbed plugin config works locally (read through the .balls/plugins symlink) but is not on the tracker branch, so it is never pushed and a fresh tracker clone does not inherit it. It self-heals only when the next bl plugin enable/disable/policy runs (plugin_admin::commit_change does a blanket git_add_all). Verified on a throwaway migration of a faithful dogfood bare-hub copy: post-migration 'git -C .balls/state-repo status' shows github.json + github-issues.json untracked, and they stay untracked across a bl prime sync. Fix: commit the absorbed files within state_repo::ensure after absorb_plugins_dir (move the seed commit after the symlink/absorb step, or add an explicit commit). Found by the bl-dc2b verification.
title: Migration leaves absorbed .balls/plugins/* uncommitted in the state checkout
